results.title: DRAP sets October 9 deadline for mandatory medicine track and trace system
results.description: Sources said the Drug Regulatory Authority of Pakistan (DRAP) has fixed October 9 as the deadline for implementing a mandatory 2D barcode and serialization system on medicine packaging across the country.

results.title: How Korea Came to Live Beneath 50 North Korean Nuclear Warheads
results.description: North Korea now holds more than 50 nuclear warheads. Experts say short-term US politics and the 2019 Hanoi no-deal drove the crisis, urging Seoul to leverage Trump's interest in Pyongyang.

results.title: Jordan condemns Iranian missile and drone attacks on Bahrain, Kuwait
results.description: Jordan has strongly condemned the Iranian missile and drone attacks targeting the Kingdom of Bahrain and the State of Kuwait, describing them as a flagrant violation of the sovereignty of both countries and a serious escalation that threatens their security, stability and territorial integrity.In a statement...
